title: Ethidiumbromide-free RNA sample preparation for agarose gels
steps: Mix RNA sample with Midori Green Premix and 2 x loading dye: add 5 µl RNA (= x µg) add 2 µl Midori Green Mix add 7 µl 2 x loading dye
Denature RNA: incubate samples at 95 C for 5 min cool samples on ice for 1 min spin down samples at ~13,000 g for 15 sec load samples to gel
2 x RNA loading dye (w/o fluorescent stain) 95% (v/v) formamide (deionized) 0.025% (v/v) SDS 0.5 mM EDTA 0.1 % (w/v) xylencyanole 0.1 % (w/v) bromphenol blue
creator: Dennis DD Dienst
